===Pokémon Adventures===
[[File:Grusha Adventures.png|thumb|right|x300px|Grusha in [[Pokémon Adventures]]]]
Grusha debuted in <!--[[PASV27]]-->the {{MangaArc|Scarlet & Violet}}. He was first seen in front of the [[Glaseado Gym]], where he came across a [[Rotom Phone]] that was thrown out the window of a passing by [[Flying Taxi]]. When he answered a call the phone was receiving, he found it was coming from {{adv|Nemona}}, who informed him the phone's owner was a girl named {{Scarlet}}. Grusha traveled to [[Montenevera]], where he met with Nemona and [[Ryme]] and handed the phone off to the former. With assistance from [[Cassiopeia]], Nemona learned that Scarlet was kidnapped by some {{tc|Team Star Grunt}}s and was being taken to [[North Province (Area Two)]]. Nemona wanted to head down and rescue her friend, but with no available Flying Taxis to ride, she was forced to ride with Grusha down [[Glaseado Mountain]]'s perilous slopes.

Upon arriving at [[North Province (Area One)]], Nemona thanked Grusha for his assistance and said her farewells. Before she left, Grusha warned Nemona about Scarlet, revealing that he and the other [[Gym Leader]]s were under orders by the {{pal|Pokémon League}} to monitor Scarlet, as she was an unidentified person who illegally enrolled into [[Uva Academy]] under a false identity.
{{-}}
